geocode.source: Richmond: South Railroad Avenu - Fremont Avenue

text:
580 South Railroad Avenue, south side, west of Fremont Avenue, showing the South Shore Republican Club.

May 26, 1935

P. L. Sperr
title: Richmond: South Railroad Avenu - Fremont Avenue

topic: Railroad tracks -- New York (State) -- New York

text:
(1) S. Railroad Avenue (extreme right), north from Fremont Avenue, showing the Grant City Station of the Staten Island Railroad. On the extreme left is North Railroad Avenue.

May 26, 1935

P. L. Sperr

(2) Another view, seen across North Railroad Avenue.

May 26, 1935

P. L. Sperr
